title: SessionLedgerEntry
description: One JSONL line written by record_iteration() in bin/minsky-run.sh for each non-no-task iteration. Feeds scripts/compute-session-metrics.mjs (M1.5 + M1.7).

session_id.description: Unique run identifier ($MINSKY_RUN_ID when set, otherwise task_id). Groups multiple iterations of the same task.

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this record was written.

task_id.description: The task identifier that was picked and iterated (matches experiment_id in the experiment-store record).

verdict.description: Outcome of the iteration. Records with verdict=no-task are never written to the session ledger.

files_changed.description: Number of files changed between HEAD~1 and HEAD in the host repo at record time. 0 when git diff is unavailable or the agent made no commits.

loc_delta.description: Net lines-of-code delta (additions minus deletions) between HEAD~1 and HEAD. Negative values indicate net deletions. 0 when git diff is unavailable.
